text.message: I can add a nb to this
and you were supposed to nb
it was nb and wood and you havent done any
You gonna keep stealing from me?
A wood trade does not mean any trash trade
I offered wood for ore, brick, or wheat
it means you trade what i offer
and you didnt even try to nb
mate that has nothing to do with the deal
Confusing play, black is in the lead.
You’re playing a ranked Catan game
Well I’m a person not a robot
Not blocking the guy in first is worse.
